description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gray horizontal siding exterior and a shingled gable roof. The front features a covered porch with white railings and columns, adjacent to a double garage with paneled doors. The house has multiple rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and a small landscaped area with green grass and flowering bushes along one side. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a simple, boxy structure with minimal ornamentation. The overall design is practical and modern, with clean lines and a focus on functionality.
description: A two-story gray house with a gable roof, covered porch, double garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, double garage, and main entry with landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, a row of bushes, and the simple window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall with several windows and no visible entry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch extension and additional windows on both stories.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white columns, steps, and a main door adjacent to a double garage
